name: [smoke] row 1 — unselected with label and description
[smoke] row 2 — selected with label and description
[smoke] row 3 — indeterminate with label and description
[fn] indeterminate=true overrides selected=true → checked is "mixed" not true
[fn] controlled: selected prop controls state regardless of press
[fn] press fires onSelectedChange with toggled value (false → true)
[fn] press fires onSelectedChange with toggled value (true → false)
[fn] press on indeterminate fires onSelectedChange with true (always selects)
[fn] disabled=true blocks press — onSelectedChange not called
[fn] readOnly=true blocks press — onSelectedChange not called
[fn] uncontrolled: press toggles internal state (false → true → false)
[fn] onSelectedChange called with exact toggled value each press
[fn] disabled=true blocks onPress too — neither handler fires
[fn] readOnly=true blocks onPress too — neither handler fires
[fn] controlled: press calls onSelectedChange but state is driven by prop
[fn] onPress fires without onSelectedChange set (standalone press handler)
[fn] description renders as visible text below label
[fn] label Text node is accessible=false (label in accessibilityLabel, not label Text)
[fn] no label, no description → no text in tree
[fn] testID is forwarded to the Pressable (interactive element)
[bug] BUG-CBX-4b: readOnly=true → accessibilityState.disabled=true (regression — should be false)
[fn] readOnly=true with selected=true → still shows checked=true
[fn] legacy size aliases: "small" → s, "medium" → m, "large" → l
[a11y] aria-hidden element is not findable by role
[bug] BUG-CBX-1: readOnly=true — aria-readonly is never set on the Pressable
[bug] BUG-CBX-1: disabled=true — aria-disabled is never set despite being in ariaProps
[bug] BUG-CBX-3: data-size and data-appearance are not on native Pressable (dead code)
[bug] BUG-CBX-4: readOnly checkbox has no a11y signal — screen reader sees it as interactive
